initial_location_description: The interior of a steam-era passenger car is undergoing a horrific transformation; the floor and walls are being overtaken by pulsating, veiny masses of pink demon flesh and rows of blinking eyes.
initial_bgm: tense orchestral with heavy brass and a heartbeat rhythm

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The very steel of the Mugen Train groans as it twists, the metal melding with biological matter. The demon has become the vehicle itself.
main_dialogue.tone: Deep, ominous, and cinematic; painting a picture of overwhelming scale.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] The scent... it's not coming from a single direction anymore. The entire train smells like a demon!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and strained; high-pitched with the realization of a nightmare.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: I should be ashamed! To think I fell into such a deep sleep that I allowed this to happen!
main_dialogue.tone: Booming and vibrant; even in a crisis, his voice carries an unwavering, fiery confidence.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral, standing straight, arms at sides, wide enthusiastic smile

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Kamado, boy! Young Hashibira! You two search for the neck! The rest of us will protect the passengers in these five cars!
main_dialogue.tone: Commanding and authoritative; every word is a strike of a hammer on an anvil.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Action, pointing forward with determination, eyes wide and fiery, shouting

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: I ALREADY FOUND IT! I CAN FEEL THE VIBRATIONS OF THE WEAK POINT BENEATH THE FLOOR! FOLLOW THE KING OF THE MOUNTAIN!
main_dialogue.tone: Aggressive and boastful; muffled slightly by his mask but bursting with raw energy.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing loudly and aggressively

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: Thunder Breathing, First Form... Thunderclap and Flash... Sixfold!
main_dialogue.tone: Whisper-quiet but deadly; the 'Vocal Sleep'—low, rhythmic, and devoid of his usual panic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, head tilted down in a deep sleep, hand resting on sword hilt

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.tone: Protective and fierce; though muffled by bamboo, the intensity of her resolve is clear.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined look, furrowed brows, standing tall and protective

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Coordinate with Inosuke to strike the engine floor.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Inosuke! We have to time this perfectly! If we don't cut through the bone in one go, he'll just regenerate!
branching_dialogue.tone: Strategic and focused; his voice is steady despite the chaos around them.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
branching_dialogue.text: DON'T TELL ME WHAT TO DO! BUT I'LL DO IT ANYWAY! BREATH OF THE BEAST, PIERCE!
branching_dialogue.tone: Wild and frenetic; shouting at the top of his lungs with competitive spirit.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, charging forward with swords at sides, steam puffing from nostrils

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.tone: A prayer-like intensity; the tone is transcendent, rising to a crescendo of pure willpower.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Rely on your sense of smell to lead the way.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I can see the thread! The opening is right there, beneath the thickest mass of flesh!
branching_dialogue.tone: Hyper-focused; the 'Zen' tone where everything else falls away except the target.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
branching_dialogue.text: Move it, Monjiro! I'm the one who's going to tear this thing apart!
branching_dialogue.tone: Hot-blooded and impulsive; rushing headlong into the fray.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, crouching low, dual serrated swords drawn and crossed, intense combat stance

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.tone: Explosive and resolute; the finality of a hero's finishing blow.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The front of the train is a nightmare of organic architecture. A massive, white-calcified bone—the demon's neck—is exposed beneath a floor made of writhing, blood-soaked muscles.
